name: Delta Resources Limited
description: Delta Resources Limited is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on growing shareholder value through the exploration and development of high-potential gold and base metal projects in Canada. The company's primary focus is the Delta-1 Project located in the Thunder Bay district of Ontario, which covers a significant strike length of the Shebandowan structural belt and has shown high-grade gold mineralization. Delta also holds the Delta-2 Project in the Chibougamau mining district of Quebec, targeting gold and polymetallic VMS deposits. Led by an experienced management team, Delta Resources employs systematic exploration techniques to advance its portfolio of strategic assets in prolific mining jurisdictions.
